scores.correctness_notes: Covers all gold standard points: type oci-image, description field, containers linkage, resource name matching. Includes additional valid details like upstream-source and file type contrast.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'description' field is listed as Required (✅ Yes) but gold standard marks it as optional. The upstream-source field details and charmhub validation claim may be accurate but go beyond the gold standard. Minor inaccuracy on description being required.
